3bb647aceb7c.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
3bb647aceb7c.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
3bb647aceb7c.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

be0ff6e8cd98.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
be0ff6e8cd98.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

99f8ac21ce08.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
99f8ac21ce08.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
99f8ac21ce08.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

1d247b4a4e4f.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
1d247b4a4e4f.description: With 311 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
